title: Aaron
description: The library for most of my mods
body:
I am Aaron, and this is Aaron.

Aaron is a library mod used by many of my mods, to reduce duplicated code. It includes stuff like

- Schedulers
- Packet helpers
- Screen and menu utilities
- Better fake players
- A bunch of handy utility functions
- Extra codecs

Why is my mod named my name? Because it's funny, shut up.
